'''yojataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadral|quadral]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-j-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadral|quadral]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yojataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yojatithi|yojatithi]] || [[word:yojatiji|yojatiji]] || [[word:yojatishi|yojatishi]] || [[word:yojatiki|yojatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yojatuthuthu|yojatuthuthu]] || [[word:yojatujuju|yojatujuju]] || [[word:yojatushushu|yojatushushu]] || [[word:yojatukuku|yojatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yojatuthu|yojatuthu]] || [[word:yojatuju|yojatuju]] || [[word:yojatushu|yojatushu]] || [[word:yojatuku|yojatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yojatufthuf|yojatufthuf]] || [[word:yojatufjuf|yojatufjuf]] || [[word:yojatufshuf|yojatufshuf]] || [[word:yojatufkuf|yojatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yojatethe|yojatethe]] || [[word:yojateje|yojateje]] || [[word:yojateshe|yojateshe]] || [[word:yojateke|yojateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yojatothotho|yojatothotho]] || [[word:yojatojojo|yojatojojo]] || [[word:yojatoshosho|yojatoshosho]] || [[word:yojatokoko|yojatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yojatotho|yojatotho]] || [[word:yojatojo|yojatojo]] || [[word:yojatosho|yojatosho]] || [[word:yojatoko|yojatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yojatofthof|yojatofthof]] || [[word:yojatofjof|yojatofjof]] || [[word:yojatofshof|yojatofshof]] || [[word:yojatofkof|yojatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yojatÃŸfthÃŸf|yojatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yojatÃŸfjÃŸf|yojatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yojatÃŸfshÃŸf|yojatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yojatÃŸfkÃŸf|yojatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yojatÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|yojatÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yojatÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|yojatÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yojatÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|yojatÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yojatÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|yojatÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yojatÃŸfthÃŸf|yojatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yojatÃŸfjÃŸf|yojatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yojatÃŸfshÃŸf|yojatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yojatÃŸfkÃŸf|yojatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yojatÃŸfthÃŸf|yojatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yojatÃŸfjÃŸf|yojatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yojatÃŸfshÃŸf|yojatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yojatÃŸfkÃŸf|yojatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yojatÃḊthÃḊ|yojatÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:yojatÃḊjÃḊ|yojatÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:yojatÃḊshÃḊ|yojatÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:yojatÃḊkÃḊ|yojatÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yojatathatha|yojatathatha]] || [[word:yojatajaja|yojatajaja]] || [[word:yojatashasha|yojatashasha]] || [[word:yojatakaka|yojatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yojatatha|yojatatha]] || [[word:yojataja|yojataja]] || [[word:yojatasha|yojatasha]] || [[word:yojataka|yojataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yojatafthaf|yojatafthaf]] || [[word:yojatafjaf|yojatafjaf]] || [[word:yojatafshaf|yojatafshaf]] || [[word:yojatafkaf|yojatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yojatasha|yojatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yojatshÃḋsha|yojatshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yojatrosha|yojatrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yojatmusha|yojatmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yojatyasha|yojatyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyojatnkshÃḋsha|goyojatnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyojatnkrosha|goyojatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyojatnkmusha|goyojatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyojatnkyasha|goyojatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yojajatasha|yojajatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yojajatshÃḋsha|yojajatshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yojajatrosha|yojajatrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yojajatmusha|yojajatmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yojajatyasha|yojajatyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyojajatnkshÃḋsha|goyojajatnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyojajatnkrosha|goyojajatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyojajatnkmusha|goyojajatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyojajatnkyasha|goyojajatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yejÃḊtasha|yejÃḊtasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yejÃḊtshÃḋsha|yejÃḊtshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yejÃḊtrosha|yejÃḊtrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yejÃḊtmusha|yejÃḊtmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yejÃḊtyasha|yejÃḊtyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyejÃḊtnkshÃḋsha|goyejÃḊtnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyejÃḊtnkrosha|goyejÃḊtnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyejÃḊtnkmusha|goyejÃḊtnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyejÃḊtnkyasha|goyejÃḊtnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yojfatasha|yojfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yojfatshÃḋsha|yojfatshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yojfatrosha|yojfatrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yojfatmusha|yojfatmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yojfatyasha|yojfatyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyojfatnkshÃḋsha|goyojfatnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyojfatnkrosha|goyojfatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyojfatnkmusha|goyojfatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyojfatnkyasha|goyojfatnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
